message:
🌱 cert-manager: Add support for JKS, PKCS12 and PEM files (#1841)

* 🌱 Add cert-manager: Add support for JKS, PKCS12 and PEM files mission

* 🌱 Add cert-manager: Add support for JKS, PKCS12 and PEM files mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cert-manager-586-add-support-for-jks-pkcs12-and-pem-files",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cert-manager: Add support for JKS, PKCS12 and PEM files",
+    "description": "Add support for JKS, PKCS12 and PEM files. Requested by 31+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cert-manager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cert-manager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cert-manager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cert-manager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cert-manager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get configmap -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cert-manager\n```\nIt would be great if cert-manager supported different packaging formats, such as Java Keystore (https://www.digitalocean.com/community/tutorials/java-keytool-essentials-working-with-java-keystores),"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for JKS, PKCS12 and PEM files",
+        "description": "This PR adds a new experimental flag to enable generating PKCS12 bundles in 'target secrets'.\n\nThis flag will be replaced with native support for PKCS12 bundles in future, once #2402 has been implemented.\n\n/\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support for JKS, PKCS12 and PEM files\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR adds a new experimental flag to enable generating PKCS12 bundles in 'target secrets'.\n\nThis flag will be replaced with native support for PKCS12 bundles in future, once #2402 has been implemented.\n\n/",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cert-manager",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cert-manager"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/issues/586",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/cert-manager/cert-manager/pull/2643"
+    },
+    "reactions": 31,
+    "comments": 18,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cert-manager installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:37:51.347Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
